name: All Purpose Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
2. Pour the mixture over meat and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes, or up to several hours.
3. Use the sauce to baste meat as it cooks.
4. This barbecue sauce is versatile and pairs well with red meat, fish, or chicken.
